'''Damorind Securities''' was a security corporation that manufactured and sold holding devices, such as [[force cage]]s, during the era of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. One of these models was the [[Model S-3]] [[force cage]], which was a portable version of the popular security apparatus. They also produced the [[RPC-12]] [[restraint capsule]].

*<!-- 1994-03-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 10: Bounty Hunters]]''
